## Summary

## Target Area

## Copy Goal

What should a first-time user understand more clearly?

## Safety Boundaries

Please confirm:

- [ ] This proposal does not change Human Gate or Apply Gate behavior.
- [ ] This proposal does not claim Codingape Office is a fully autonomous developer.
- [ ] This proposal does not imply automatic code writes.
- [ ] This proposal keeps the local-first / chosen project folder message clear.
- [ ] No secrets, local paths, credentials, or private screenshots are included.

## Suggested Copy

If you have draft wording, paste it here.
